title: Creating Expert Knowledge by Relying on Language Learners: a Generic Approach for Mass-Producing Language Resources by Combining Implicit Crowdsourcing and Language Learning
research_areas: T02 Corpora, Treebanks and Annotation; Tools, Systems and Platforms
T13 Knowledge discovery/representation (knowledge graphs, linked data, terminologies, lexicons, ontologies, etc.)
T29 NLP for education, Automated essay scoring and feedback generation, grammatical error correction and detection, intelligent tutoring systems
